title: Args
help: Arguments to pass to the guest program, only valid if there is no existing arguments.

title: Inprocessgpu
help: Add --in-process-gpu argument to the guest program.

title: Insert Args
help: Prepend arguments to the command line.

title: Nosandbox
help: Add --no-sandbox argument to the guest program.

title: Aes
help: Expose AES capabilities. Available in WowBox64.

title: Arch
help: Specify the architecture in rcfiles to which the current entry applies. This option only takes effect when used inside rcfiles.

title: Avx
help: Expose AVX extension to CPUID and cpuinfo file. Default value is 2 on Arm64 and LoongArch64 because it's fully implemented in DynaRec, 0 otherwise. Available in WowBox64.

title: Bash
help: Path to the bash executable.

title: Cputype
help: Specify the CPU type to emulate. Available in WowBox64.

title: Crashhandler
help: Use a dummy crash handler or not.

title: Dynarec Bleeding Edge
help: Detect MonoBleedingEdge and apply conservative settings (Linux only).

title: Dynarec Div0
help: Enable or disable the generation of division-by-zero exception. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Interp Signal
help: Allow the use of DynaRec in Signal Handlers.

title: Dynarec Tbb
help: Enable or disable libtbb detection.

title: Dynarec X87 Double
help: Force the use of float/double for x87 emulation. Available in WowBox64.

title: Exit
help: Just exit, do not try to run the program.

title: Fix 64 Bit Inodes
help: Fix 64bit inodes.

title: Force Ld Preload
help: Force symbols from BOX64_LD_PRELOAD libraries to be resolved by RTLD_NEXT.

title: Ignoreint3
help: Ignore INT3 instructions.

title: Jvm
help: Detect libjvm and apply conservative settings.

title: Libcef
help: Detect libcef and apply BOX64_MALLOC_HACK settings.

title: Malloc Hack
help: Behaviour when hooking malloc operators.

title: Maxcpu
help: Maximum CPU cores exposed. Available in WowBox64.

title: Nopersona32 Bits
help: Disable the automatic switch of personality for 32-bit binaries (always enabled on Box32).

title: Norcfiles
help: Do not load any rc files.

title: Path
help: Path to look for x86_64 binaries.
readOnlyReason: Managed by BachataS4 runtime launch wiring.

title: Pclmulqdq
help: Expose PCLMULQDQ capabilities. Available in WowBox64.

title: Profile
help: Predefined sets of environment variables with compatibility or performance in mind. Available in WowBox64.
readOnlyReason: Managed by BachataS4 runtime launch wiring.

title: Python3
help: Path to a python3 executable.

title: Rcfile
help: Path to the rc file to load.

title: Rdtsc Inv
help: Report Invariant TSC bit in CPUID for Intel CPU type. Available in WowBox64.

title: Reserve High
help: Reserve high memory area for the program, always enabled on Box32.

title: Sdl2 Jguid
help: Use a workaround for SDL_GetJoystickGUIDInfo function for wrapped SDL2.

title: Shaext
help: Expose SHAEXT (a.k.a. SHA_NI) capabilities. Available in WowBox64.

title: Sse Flushto0
help: Behaviour of SSE Flush to 0 flags. Also tracking SSE exception flags. Available in WowBox64.

title: Sse42
help: Expose SSE4.2 capabilities. Available in WowBox64.

title: Steam Vulkan
help: Force Vulkan for Linux Steam UI.

title: Sync Rounding
help: Synchronize rounding mode between x86 and native.

title: Unity
help: Games is a Unity one.

title: Unityplayer
help: Detect UnityPlayer and apply conservative settings.

title: X11 Glx
help: Force Xorg GLX extension to be present.

title: X11 Sync
help: Force synchronized operation on X11 display.

title: X11 Threads
help: Call XInitThreads when loading X11. This is mostly for old Loki games with the Loki_Compat library.

title: X87 No80 Bits
help: Behaviour of x87 80bits long double. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dlsym Error
help: Enable or disable the logging of dlsym errors.

title: Dump
help: Dump elfloader debug information. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Dump
help: Enable DynaRec dump. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Dump Range
help: Dump DynaRec blocks in the specified range. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Gdbjit
help: The GDBJIT debugging support, only available on build with -DGDBJIT=ON, enable it with gdb command: jit-reader-load /usr/local/lib/libbox64gdbjitreader.so.

title: Dynarec Log
help: Disable or enable DynaRec logs. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Missing
help: Print missing opcodes. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Nohostext
help: Disable optional host extensions.

title: Dynarec Perfmap
help: Generate map file for Linux perf tool.

title: Dynarec Test
help: Enable DynaRec execution comparison with the interpreter, very slow, only for testing. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Test Nodump
help: Do not dump test code when BOX64_DYNAREC_DUMP is enabled. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Test Nodup
help: Enable deduplication of IP address where COSIM find a difference. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Trace
help: Enable or disable DynaRec trace.

title: Jitgdb
help: Launch gdb or not for SIGSEGV, SIGILL, and SIGBUS.

title: Load Addr
help: Set the address where the program is loaded, only active for PIE guest programs.
readOnlyReason: Managed by BachataS4 runtime launch wiring.

title: Log
help: Enable or disable Box64 logs, default value is 0 if stdout is not terminal, 1 otherwise. Available in WowBox64.

title: Nobanner
help: Disable the Box64 banner. Available in WowBox64.

title: Nodynarec
help: Forbid DynaBlock creation in the address range specified, helpful for debugging behaviour difference between DynaRec and Interpreter. Available in WowBox64.

title: Nodynarec Delay
help: Remove NoDynaRec range after a delay. Available in WowBox64.

title: Nosigill
help: Disable the handling of SIGILL.

title: Nosigsegv
help: Disable the handling of SIGSEGV.

title: Rolling Log
help: Show last few wrapped function call when a signal is caught.

title: Showbt
help: Show native and emulated backtrace when a signal is caught.

title: Showsegv
help: Always show SIGSEGV signal details.

title: Trace
help: Only available on box64 build with trace. Adds trace of all instructions executed, along with a register dump.

title: Trace Color
help: Enable or disable colored trace output.

title: Trace Emm
help: Enable or disable EMM (i.e. MMX) trace output.

title: Trace File
help: Send all log and trace to a file instead of stdout.

title: Trace Init
help: Same as BOX64_TRACE but starts the trace immediately.

title: Trace Start
help: Start trace after N opcodes executed.

title: Trace Xmm
help: Enable or disable XMM (i.e. SSE) trace output.

title: Env
help: Add an environment variable.

title: Env[1-5]
help: Add an environment variable.

title: Dynarec Purge
help: Purge DynaBlocks that haven't been executed recently, based on tick age threshold (BOX64_DYNAREC_PURGE_AGE).

title: Dynarec Purge Age
help: Tick age threshold for DynaBlock purging (requires BOX64_DYNAREC_PURGE=1).

title: Dynarec Wait
help: Wait or not for the building of a DynaRec code block to be ready. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Weakbarrier
help: Tweak the memory barriers to reduce the performance impact by strong memory emulation. Available in WowBox64.

title: Addlibs
help: Add extras to the needed libraries list, rarely needed.

title: Allowmissinglibs
help: Allow missing libraries to be ignored.

title: Emulated Libs
help: Force the use of emulated libraries.
readOnlyReason: Managed by BachataS4 runtime launch wiring.

title: Ld Library Path
help: Path to look for x86_64 libraries.
readOnlyReason: Managed by BachataS4 runtime launch wiring.

title: Ld Preload
help: Force loading libraries with the binary.

title: Libgl
help: Set the name for libGL.

title: Nogtk
help: Do not load wrapped GTK libraries.

title: Nopulse
help: Do not load PulseAudio libraries (both native and x86_64).

title: Novulkan
help: Do not load Vulkan libraries.

title: Novulkanoverlay
help: Do not load x64 Vulkan overlay.

title: Prefer Emulated
help: Prefer emulated libraries over native ones.

title: Prefer Wrapped
help: Prefer wrapped libs first even if the lib is specified with absolute path.

title: Wrap Egl
help: Prefer wrapped libs for EGL and GLESv2.

title: Dynacache
help: Enable/disable the Dynamic Recompiler Cache (a.k.a DynaCache). This option defaults to 2 (to read cache if present but not generate any). DynaCache writes files to the home folder by default, and keeps its folder below BOX64_DYNACACHE_LIMIT when generating new cache files.

title: Dynacache Compress
help: Compress or not DynaCache files on disk

title: Dynacache Folder
help: Set the folder for DynaCache files. Default is $XDG_CACHE_HOME/box64 or $HOME/.cache/box64 if $XDG_CACHE_HOME is not set.

title: Dynacache Limit
help: Maximum size, in MiB, for the DynaCache folder. When the limit is exceeded, invalid DynaCache files are removed first, then the oldest valid files are removed if needed. Default size is 2048MiB.

title: Dynacache Min
help: Minimum size, in KB, for a DynaCache to be written to disk. Default size is 30KB

title: Dynarec
help: Enable/disable the Dynamic Recompiler (a.k.a DynaRec). This option defaults to 1 if it's enabled in the build options for a supported architecture. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Aligned Atomics
help: Generate aligned atomics only (only available on Arm64 for now). Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Bigblock
help: Enable building bigger DynaRec code blocks for better performance. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Callret
help: Optimize CALL/RET opcodes. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Df
help: Enable or disable the use of deferred flags. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Dirty
help: Allow continue running a block that is unprotected and potentially dirty.

title: Dynarec Fastnan
help: Enable or disable fast NaN handling. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Fastround
help: Enable or disable fast rounding. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Forward
help: Define max allowed forward value when building block. Only 0, 128, 256, 512 and 1024 are valid; other values fall back to 128. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Nativeflags
help: Enable or disable the use of native flags. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Noarch
help: Remove Architecture metadata from DynaRec blocks (used on signal). Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Nohotpage
help: Disable detection of hot page (where code is executed and data written at the same time).

title: Dynarec Pause
help: Enable x86 PAUSE emulation, may help the performance of spinlocks. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Safeflags
help: Behaviour of flags emulation on CALL/RET opcodes and other edge cases. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Sep
help: Optimize CALL/RET further with Secondary Entry Points (SEP). Has no effect if CALLRET is not enabled Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Strongmem
help: Enable the emulation of x86 strong memory model. Available in WowBox64.

title: Dynarec Volatile Metadata
help: Use volatile metadata parsed from PE files, only valid for 64bit Windows games.

title: Mmap32
help: Force 32-bit compatible memory mappings on 64-bit programs that run 32-bit code (like Wine WOW64), can improve performance.

title: Rdtsc 1 Ghz
help: Use hardware counter for rdtsc if available.
